title: Trump Agrees to Ethics Provision as Crypto Bill Inches Closer to Senate Vote
summary: President Trump has agreed to ethics language in a crypto bill, potentially moving the ball forward to getting crypto legislation passed into law.
body:
President Donald Trump has agreed to include ethics provisions in a major crypto bill, bringing the legislation one step closer to a Senate vote. This agreement resolves a key sticking point that had stalled the bill's progress, potentially paving the way for its passage into law.

The ethics provisions are aimed at preventing conflicts of interest and ensuring transparency in crypto-related policymaking. The bill, which has been in the works for months, seeks to provide regulatory clarity for the cryptocurrency industry in the United States. While the specific details of the ethics language have not been disclosed, the agreement is seen as a significant breakthrough.

This development is crucial for crypto businesses and investors, as it could bring much-needed regulatory certainty. Clear regulations can foster innovation, protect consumers, and prevent fraud, making the crypto market more stable and trustworthy. The bill's passage could also position the U.S. as a leader in the global crypto landscape.

The next step is for the Senate to schedule and vote on the bill. If passed, it will move to the House for further approval before being signed into law. Crypto enthusiasts and industry stakeholders should watch for updates on the Senate's schedule and any potential amendments to the bill.
twitterThread: President Trump has agreed to ethics language in a major crypto bill, potentially moving the ball forward to getting crypto legislation passed into law.
The ethics provisions aim to prevent conflicts of interest and ensure transparency in crypto policymaking. This is a big step for the U.S. crypto industry.

If passed, this could bring regulatory clarity and stability to the crypto market. Watch for Senate updates and potential amendments. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-21-trumps-agreement-on-ethics-provision-moves-crypto-bill-closer-to-senate-vote
